core_content.markdown:
## 笔试部分(60分) ## 五、 判断下列单词画线部分的发音是(Y)否(N)相同。(5分) )1.what who )2.where which )3.when whose )4.white wall )5.wait wash ## 六、 将下列短语与其对应的图片连线。(5分) 1.watch TV 2.clean the room 3.have an English class 4.drink water 5.draw pictures A.
C.
E.
## 七、 单项选择。(5分) )1.-What are they doing? C.They are reading books. )2.They are walking a bridge. A. at B.in C.on )3.Talk A.quiet B. quietly C.loud )4.Can you music with me? A.to play B.playing C.play 5.What are you ? A.saying B.tells C. say ## 分） Whatare the students doing?
2.—What is Wang Jin doing?
